india_trends.title: Zee Entertainment to invest up to Rs 116 crore in VFX studio PhantomFX
india_trends.summary: Zee Entertainment Enterprises is investing up to Rs 116 crore in Phantom Digital Effects Ltd. to expand into the AVGC segment. This strategic move aims to enhance Zee's content creation capabilities across platforms and genres by leveraging PhantomFX's global expertise and AI-integrated production.

india_trends.title: UltraTech crosses 200 million tonne capacity in India
india_trends.summary: UltraTech Cement has achieved a significant milestone, crossing 200 million tonnes in production capacity in India. This expansion solidifies its leadership in the Indian market and positions it as the world's largest cement producer outside China. The company plans further growth, aiming for 240 mi

india_trends.title: Smartworks bets on structural shift as managed offices become mainstream
india_trends.summary: India's managed office sector is entering a period of strong growth. Smartworks, a leading platform, is expanding rapidly with large campus formats. Enterprises are increasingly adopting managed workspaces as a long-term strategy. This trend is fueled by a demand-supply mismatch in Grade A office sp

india_trends.title: West Asia crisis: Govt expands export insurance scheme
india_trends.summary: India's government has expanded its RELIEF scheme to cover Jordan and Egypt. This move offers higher insurance to exporters facing disruptions from the West Asia crisis. The scheme aims to strengthen export resilience and sustain trade flows. Exporters obtaining new policies after March 16, 2026, ar

india_trends.title: Kadimi Group expands global footprint
india_trends.summary: Kadimi Tool Manufacturing Co. , a player in the fastener and cold forging industry, recently made its first global acquisition with the US-based Rol-flo Engineering Inc.

india_trends.title: RIL to announce Q4 earnings on April 24; board to consider final dividend
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries will announce Q4FY26 earnings on April 24 as its board meets to approve results and consider final dividend for FY26 followed by an analyst meet to discuss performance and outlook

india_trends.title: Panasonic Partners with ANACITY to Co-Create Next-Gen Smart Community Solutions in India
india_trends.summary: ANACITY has partnered with Panasonic to develop advanced smart home and community solutions. This collaboration will integrate Panasonic's IoT hardware with ANACITY's digital platform. The aim is to enhance security and living experiences for residents and improve workplace operations. india_trends.summary: Sensex Surges 500 Points, Nifty Near 24,400 as Market Rally Gains Strength    UdaipurTimes.com

india_trends.title: Trent to consider bonus, dividend along with Q4 results on this date. Check details
india_trends.summary: On April 22, 2026, Trent's board will review Q4 FY26 financials, potential interim dividends, and the introduction of bonus shares and an ESOP. After remaining under pressure for a prolonged period, shares of the Tata Group company staged a strong rebound in April, rising 24.63% so far.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Assam LPG, fuel supply fully stable, adequate stocks available: IndianOil AOD
india_trends.summary: Nitin Bhatnagar, Executive Director and State Head of IndianOil AOD State said that the supply of domestic LPG cylinders and petroleum products in the state of Assam remains completely normal and adequate stocks of both LPG and petroleum products are available across the state

india_trends.title: Dish TV appoints three independent directors with shareholder approval
india_trends.summary: Dish TV India shareholders overwhelmingly approved the appointment of three independent directors, signaling strong confidence in the company's strategic direction. This move reinforces the DTH operator's focus on strengthening core operations and pursuing sustainable growth across its DTH business

india_trends.title: Paracetamol may get costlier as Vizag chemists warn 30–40% drug cost surge amid Iran war-led pharma cost shock
india_trends.summary: The ongoing conflict in Iran is impacting India's healthcare sector. Pharmaceutical distributors warn of significant price increases for essential medicines. Soaring raw material costs, particularly from West Asia, are forcing manufacturers to adjust prices. While current stock remains unaffected, f

india_trends.title: India turns the tables on China: The great supply chain flip begins
india_trends.summary: India's electronics sector is transforming. For years, the country assembled products using imported parts. Now, Indian companies are exporting electronic components, even to China. This marks a significant shift from just assembly to deeper manufacturing involvement. This change is driven by govern

india_trends.title: Pulse of the Street: Indian stocks cool after surge as global markets race ahead
india_trends.summary: The Nifty 50 and Sensex rose over 1% this week, extending gains after last week’s near 6% surge — their strongest in over five years — but the pace has now moderated. On Friday, both indices closed about 0.65% higher, with the Nifty at 24,353.55 and the Sensex at 78,493.56.

india_trends.title: Wall Street hits fresh record highs after Iran reopens Strait of Hormuz; Brent slips below $90
india_trends.summary: US equities surged on 17 April, with two indices hitting record highs after Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz is fully open, allowing oil tankers to operate. The S&amp;P 500 rose 1.34%, while crude oil prices fell 10%, providing relief to investors.

india_trends.title: Russian bank, PSUs help NBCC generate Rs 5,779 cr from office tower sale in south Delhi
india_trends.summary: Russia's Sberbank has acquired two office towers in South Delhi for approximately Rs 2,000 crore. NBCC sold these towers as part of a larger e-auction of 14 lakh sq ft across five towers at Bharat Business Park. This auction achieved a record sale value for NBCC. The funds will support ongoing redev

india_trends.title: Indian refiner Reliance rejects Iran oil cargoes as waiver deadline looms
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries has rejected two Iranian oil cargoes. This comes just before a U.S. waiver on Iranian oil exports expires. Washington will not renew these waivers. India had allowed Reliance to buy Iranian oil on several sanctioned tankers. Reliance stated the Derya tanker cargo did not meet com

india_trends.title: India markets draw long-term capital amid global volatility: SEBI chief
india_trends.summary: Pandey flags strong fund mobilisation, rising domestic participation; reforms to ease access, deepen debt markets

india_trends.title: US Stocks: Russell 2000 scales intraday peak weeks after war-driven slide into correction
india_trends.summary: The small-cap Russell 2000 hit its first ​intraday record high ​on Friday since the U.S.-Iran conflict erupted, ​joining other major indexes at all-time highs and suggesting the recent equities rally is broadening beyond large companies.

india_trends.title: Trent seeks nod for fundraise, bonus issue as FY27 expansion drive kicks in
india_trends.summary: Retailer also set to announce FY26 results and potential dividend as Zudio-led expansion gains pace
